top.name: Tectonic Shatter
top.rules_text: Destroy all Stone pillars and rubble you control. For each destroyed deal 5 damage to nearest enemy and create difficult terrain.

channel.name: Tectonic Shatter (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Deal 9 damage per destroyed instead

bottom.name: Elemental Cycle
bottom.rules_text: Gain 1 imbued tile of each element (Fire Ice Storm) on tiles adjacent to you.

channel.name: Elemental Cycle (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Also gain 4 armor per tile imbued
